channel.title: Index on Lambda
channel.description: Recent content in Index on Lambda

item.description: Here I keep the ideas which no player should see. Keep out! Tortoise-shell shield. Gemstones set in swords of high birth.

item.title: Proposal
item.description: Proposal An outline of what a player might expect in Lambda. Priorities The game I propose is a game in which… Decisions are more important than choices. The utmost care is taken to strip away everything which does not lead to some interesting consequence or implication. Heroes’ true character is revealed. I tend to focus on choices which impact who a character is, and what they believe in. I draw heavy inspiration from film.

item.title: Rules
item.description: Addendum Game-specific rules for Lambda. Economy Currency | Trade in this setting typically involves the trading hands of various coins. The most common coin is the Silver Dirham. Rarer, but more valuable, is the Golden Dinar. The Dinar is a smaller coin than the Dirham, but is heavier. As a reference point, most people will trade 10:1 between Silver Dirham and Golden Dinar. These coins are forged in the great cities, and circulate through many realms.

item.title: Rules
item.description: Rubicon The System for Lambda. Note that the rules here are made to be standalone, so if you encounter any strange wording, refer to the Addendum. Priorities Rubicon is a system which is… Honest. Specialized heroes. Glaring weaknesses. Dump stats matter. Progression is specific. It is earned, not expected. Character death is possible, and in many circumstances probable. Rules-light. Tight, simple core mechanic. Keep dice-rolling to a minimum. Rulings, not rules.

item.title: Setting
item.description: Setting This document outlines, in broad strokes, the setting that Lambda takes place in. A short tale from the desert. Once, here, in this very place, was the greatest kingdom known to man. In the Age of Heroes, the great palace of Aeschylon stood tall and mighty over a verdant grove. Queen Hyperion united the realms of man under a banner as strong and storied as any before it, and brought a peace hitherto unknown.
